name: xdm_secure_release_update_overlay
description: Adds stable, beta, and nightly release channels; deterministic Windows/Linux x64 and ARM64 packaging; checksums, SBOMs, attestations, optional Authenticode signing; and rollback-safe in-application updates through an external updater helper.
commitMessage: Add secure release channels and rollback-safe updates
constraints: Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve existing download, browser, media, scheduler, diagnostics, aria2, resume-integrity, and recovery behavior
Keep stable, beta, and nightly update channels isolated through channel-specific manifests
Do not apply an update unless package size and SHA-256 match; verify SHA-512 when present
Keep the updater executable outside the installation while swapping directories
Preserve a rollback backup until the updated application creates its main window and marks the transaction healthy
